examples: No project principal or supporting institution may steal or misappropriate the funds by any means.
Overstate the cash disbursements journal, record the overstated amount, and misappropriate the difference.
Breaking news goes from being unknown to widely known so quickly that there is no longer any chance to misappropriate its value.
Some African governments would disagree with this last point - and not only those who seek to misappropriate aid funds.
We have plenty of fiduciary duty laws to make sure that the fund administrators can be monitored and sued if they misappropriate the funds.
